creator: ports@grosbein.net
text:
It appears that vendor (Openlink) offers two distributions from two ftp
servers.
Archives appear to have identical contents but are compressed differently.
I did "make makesum" using one archive while Makefile points to another as
first
of MASTER_SITES. Sorry, this is my first contribution and my fault.
Collision is fixed by removing one of servers from MASTER_SITES.
Fixed version is attached.

Eugene Grosbein
